title: echinops ritro subsp. ritro
intro: Echinops ritro subsp. ritro, also known as the Globe Thistle, is a perennial plant that belongs to the aster family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid compounds. The Globe Thistle has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Echinops ritro subsp. ritro is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health issues.
